_comment: RDR-008 P1 example — declaring kind:"agent-cli" providers. These are NOT model endpoints: they carry no url/model and never enter the `backends` registry. Each entry declares an `agentKind` — the dispatcher-family discriminant the dispatcher registry (src/dispatch-registry.ts) resolves to a Dispatch. P1 ships ONE dispatcher: "qwen-local" (local Qwen via makeQwenSpawnDispatch, one-shot poll-to-completion). Merge `agent_providers` into your ~/.qwen-coprocessor-stack/config.json alongside `backends`. Env override: QWEN_AGENT_PROVIDERS (JSON array).

agent_providers._comment: Local Qwen agentic dispatcher target — the coder on the Mac (MLX), driven via the qwen-spawn dispatcher. `modalities`/`excludes`/`strengths`/`costClass`/`latencyMult` are optional and default (modalities -> ["text"], excludes -> []).
